_publications._publicationTitle: C-Fiber Loss as a Possible Cause of Neuropathic Pain in Schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Assessment of the HADS and SCL-90-R questionnaires showed a significantly higher vulnerability for anxiety and depression in the schwannomatosis cohort compared to controls (HADS: depression t(38) = −3.063, p = 0.004, anxiety U = 126.5, p = 0.046
details: Showed significantly higher vulnerability for anxiety and depression in schwannomatosis cohort compared to controls (depression t(38) = −3.063, p = 0.004; anxiety U = 126.5, p = 0.046).
